Forecasting the Future – Registration Form

New York

Please indicate your interest in participating in the Forecasting the Future challenge by entering the required information below.  

Upon submission of this form, you will receive an email with detailed instructions on how to submit your full application once your research is complete. The below form is only to register your interest in participating in the challenge. 

Please note, submitting your resume at this time is entirely optional and will not be assessed as part of the selection process. Any language below regarding applying for a job is not applicable to this challenge.

For any questions, please review the challenge website here or reach out to forecastingthefuture@bwater.com.
